titleStmt.title: SII 41.296: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 296. (A.R. No. 512 of 1905.) Tiruveḷḷaṟai, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the west wall of the central shrine in Siva (Jambunātha) temple at Tiruveḷḷaṟai.

summary.p: Sale of land by the ūrār of Paḍuvūr in Āṉmūr-kūṟṟam in Rājāśraya-vaḷanāḍu on the north bank to a temple called Gangaikoṇḍa-chōḻa-īśvaramuḍaiyār in a neighboring brahmadēya village (name lost). The ūrār undertook to pay themselves the taxes on the sold land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Iruṉi
la maṭantaiyum poṟceyap pāvaiyuñ cirtta
ṉic celviyun taṉperunteviyarāki yiṉ
tuyaruḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭun tuṭarvaṉave
rvaṉa vāciyun cuḷḷic cūḻmatiṭ koḷḷippāk
kaiyum naṇṇaṟku Arumaraṇ maṇṇaikaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻa
ttaraiyartam muṭiyumāṅkavar teviyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyu muṉṉavar pakkal te
ṉṉavar vaitta cuntaramuṭiyu mintiranāramun teṉṟirai Īḻamaṇṭalamuḻuva
tumeṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimayiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatirmā
laiyuñ caṅkatirvelait tol peruṅ kāvaṟ palpaḻantivuñ ceruvil ceṉavi(l) Irupatorukālaraicukaḷaikkaṭṭa paracurā
maṉ melvaruñ cāntimaṟṟivaraṇkaruti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttakumuṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḻitta jayac
ciṅkaḷaṉaḷapperumpukaḻoṭu piṭiyiliraṭṭapāṭi yeḻarai Ilakkamum navanitik kulapperumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirac cakkarakoṭṭamum
valla maturamaṇṭalamuṅ kāmiṭaivaḷar nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñcilai virar pañcappaḷḷiyum pārcaṭaip paḻana mācuṇite
camum Ayarvilvaṇkirtti yātinakar Avaiyiṟ cantiraṉ tolkula tintirataṉai viḷaiyarmark kaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittup palataṉat
toṭu niṟaikulatanak kuvaiyum kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai Oṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcuruvirar cernal kocalaināṭum thanmapālaṉai vemmunai Aḻit
tuvaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacuraṇai muraṇurattākkit tikkaṇai kīrttit takkaṉalāṭamum kovintacantan māviḻin toṭa
t taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷa tecamun toṭukaṭal makipālaṉai veñcamar viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟil yāṉaiyum pe
ṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭaluttiralāṭamum veṟimalart teṟipunal kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuḷ palakalañcelutti caṅkirāma
[vijaiyoṟ]tuṅka panmanākiya kiṭārattaraiyaṉai vākaiyum porukaṭal kumpak kariyoṭu makappaṭu[t turimaiyil piṟakkiya perunitip piṟakka
mum Ārttavan Akanakar portoḻil vācalil vijayātirattoraṇamum porttoḻil puṉaimaṇi putavamum kanamaṇik kata
vamum niṟaicir vijaiyamum ṭiṅka
mum kalaṅkā valviṉai yilaṅkācokamum kāppuṟu niṟai punalmāppap pāḷamum māvili
ṅkamum pantūṟuṭai vaḷaippantūṟuṅ kalaittakkorpukaḻt talaittakkolamun titamar valvinai mātamaliṅkamu
Ilāmuri tecamum tenaṟka vārpoḻil māṉakkavāramun toṭukaṭal kāval kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramu māpperun
taṇṭāl koṇṭa kopparakecari panmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrāje[ ndrac] Oḻadevarkku yāṇṭu 24 Āvatu vaṭakarai rājāśra
ya vaḷanāṭṭu Āṉmūrkkūṟṟattu paṭuvūr Ūrom Iṉṉāṭṭu prahmadeyam caṇ nakkaṉ damahādevar kaṅkai
koṇṭacoḻaīśvara muṭaiyārkku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatukiḻpārkkellai tiruveḷḷaṟaip piṭākaipa
rakesarimaṅkalattu nilattu meṟkun tenpāṟkellai ṉṉilameṉṟa paḷḷiccantam
ye Iṉ nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai tiruveḷḷaṟait tevar ceṉtāmaraikkaṇṇar Uṭaiyāḻvaāṉ vaic
leṉṟu varuṭaiya yyil kotama vayakkal nokki
kaḷ nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai nilavaḷavuppaṭi teṉvarampu
ṉaiñcum Āva
ṇakkaḷiyile
kāṭṭik kaic cella
kkoṇṭu Ikkācukku
tuvey poruḷmāvaruti
p poruṭ cilavolaiyum vi
laiyāvaṇamumāvatākavum
Ituvallatu veṟuporu
ḷmāvaṟuti poruṭcilavu kā
ṭṭa kaṭavarallātārākavum
Iṉṉilattāl vanta Iṟaiyum E
ccoṟu
ḷḷātappaṭiyum vācalil pontak kuṭimai
kaḷ Epperpaṭṭaṉavum nāṅkaḷ celuttu
muṟṟā Ittevarkku tirucceṉṉa
naṭai ṭṭup puṟamāka viṟṟukkuṭutta Iṉṉila
ttukku vāṟu nirpāccavum nirvākkavum
Āka Ipparicu Ikkāṇi patiṉai
n Araiyey
ṉa Aṟive
veḷāṉum ñcāta
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ meṟpaṭi
ṭaiyān cen Aṟive
nkūtāḻiyeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟi
ṉ kotaṇṭarāmapurattu
nāna kaṟpūra ceṭṭiyen Ivai En
yūr viyāpāri viman periyānāna
yeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ
tukiyān tirucittirakūṭamāṭuvā
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ paṭṭālakan
vai En Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ
yaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ
ṉ Aṟiveṉ Ūr ka
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tevaṉ pūva
ppaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruccāṉur
Olokamāṇikka ceṭṭi
veḷḷurkiḻavan kiḻavan
Ippaṭi Aṟiven
veḷān tayappānaṉ
kiḻavan peri
paṭi Aṟiveṉ
Digital edition of SII 41.296 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
